DATA NETWORK

FOR GAMING

NEXT GEN GAMING

GAMING IS THE

NEXT GENERATION

OF BLOCKCHAIN

Decentralised Data

Data is the new oil.

Supercharging growth

for game developers

and publishers.

PORTAL NODES

PORTAL NODES

ARE THE GATEKEEPER

OF THIS FUTURE

Nodes collect & validate on-and-off chain data on all chains

Next gen
network

Through operating a node you play a pivotal role in future of the gaming data economy

On/off
chain

In web2 gaming, data is centralised. GRID decentralises this ownership putting the power back into the hands of the player and the game

Owned by
the players

GRID aims to capture and share the value of gaming data between all players. Its time to change the narrative.

BECOME A NODE OPERATOR

DECENTRALISING
THE VALUE OF DATA
BACK TO YOU

GRID is an open-source data layer,
aggregating on & off-chain gaming data.
Putting the power back in the hands of the players.
